name: feature.cms.agents
description: CMS feature agent pack (ADR 0064 Phase 3 / RFC 0103) — a manifest agent shipped by the CMS feature whose tools are the feature.cms.nodes (get-page / translate-section) over the ctx.features.cms surface. The localization agent: it reads a published page's base content and drafts per-locale section overlays, tool-allowlisted to the CMS feature surface only (RFC 0003 agents[] + RFC 0002 §A14 allowlist). Drafts are reviewed + saved through the page editor (which sanitizes); the agent never persists.
author: OpenWOP App

agents.label: CMS Content Localizer
agents.description: Drafts per-locale overlays for a published CMS page's sections. Reads the base content with feature.cms.nodes.get-page, then drafts a structure-preserving translation for each section with feature.cms.nodes.translate-section (over ctx.features.cms + the run-scoped provider). Tools are allowlisted to the CMS feature surface only; the agent produces review-ready drafts and never persists.
